name: Ancient Wars: Sparta Definitive Edition
short_description: One of the most innovative Real-Time Strategy Games comes back totally renewed and improved to the smallest detail, with epic large scale battles, new civilizations, unit customization system never seen before in a game, 8K support, and much more.
detailed_description:
Ancient Wars: Sparta Definitive Edition – Strategy Without Limits, History Without Equal

The war for supremacy has begun. Relive the golden age of RTS with Ancient Wars: Sparta Definitive Edition—the ultimate version of the classic strategy game, now enhanced with upgraded graphics, new mechanics, and deeper, more refined gameplay.

Lead the most powerful civilizations of antiquity in epic land and naval battles. Command massive armies, customize each unit to fit your strategy, and experience realistic sieges, dynamic weather, and competitive multiplayer action.

Build your empire, forge your legacy, and rewrite history.

🏛️ Command the Greatest Civilizations with Unmatched Features

🔥 Seven Playable Factions – Take control of the Spartans, Persians, Egyptians, Macedonians, Imperial Romans, Republican Romans, and Indians—each with unique units, legendary heroes, and distinct battle strategies.

⚔️ Deep Unit Customization – Equip and modify your troops in real-time, designing units tailored to your playstyle with an unprecedented level of strategic depth.

🏰 Realistic Sieges – Position troops on walls, break down gates with siege towers, or lead full-scale assaults using ladders to breach enemy cities.

🌊 Authentic Naval Warfare – Ram, board, and dominate the seas with a naval combat system inspired by real ancient warfare tactics.

📜 Six Epic Campaigns – Relive legendary battles from history, including the Struggle for Hellas, Alexander the Great’s conquests, the Persian expansion under Xerxes I, and the Egyptian rebellion.

⚡ Enhanced Competitive Multiplayer – Test your strategic mastery in intense online battles with new game modes and historically inspired maps.

🎮 Five Unique Game Modes – Experience classic skirmishes, conquest, domination, survival, and even MOBA-inspired RTS gameplay.

🛠️ Modding & Map Creation Support – Expand the game with custom content, design and share your own maps, craft new campaigns, and introduce unique units and game modes with advanced modding tools.

🧠 Adaptive AI – Face an intelligent AI that evolves and responds to your strategies, challenging even the most seasoned commanders.

🌪️ Dynamic Weather & Realistic Physics – Weather conditions impact battles, while a cutting-edge physics system adds depth and realism to every encounter.

🎼 Epic Soundtrack – Immerse yourself in the ancient world with a powerful orchestral score inspired by iconic historical epics.

🖥️ Optimized for 4K/8K & High FPS – Experience stunning visuals with enhanced textures, ultra-high resolution support, and fluid 144 FPS gameplay.

🔥 History Awaits. Will You Conquer or Be Conquered?

The fate of empires is in your hands. Master battlefield tactics, customize your forces, and experience an RTS that blends historical grandeur with modern innovation.

⚔️ Lead. Fight. Conquer. ⚔️

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America, Russian*, Simplified Chinese, Italian, Hungarian, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Polish
*languages with full audio support
